allow: Bash(git checkout master && git pull 2>&1 || true)
Bash(cd /home/zephyr/workspace && west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 apps/sensor-node 2>&1)
Bash(west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 tests/fake_sensors --build-dir /tmp/test_build 2>&1 | head -50)

Bash(west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 apps/sensor-node 2>&1 | tail -5 && \\
west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 apps/gateway --build-dir /home/zephyr/workspace/build/native_sim_native_64/gateway 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(dpkg -l | grep -i sdl 2>/dev/null; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i sdl | head -10)
Bash(git checkout master && git checkout -b feat/lvgl-sdl-display)
Bash(which pkg-config 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"; dpkg -l | grep -E 'pkg-config|libsdl2' | head -10)

Bash(git add \\
  lib/lvgl_display/ \\
  lib/Kconfig \\
  CMakeLists.txt \\
  apps/gateway/prj.conf \\
  apps/gateway/boards/native_sim.overlay \\
  apps/gateway/boards/native_sim_native_64.conf \\
  .devcontainer/Dockerfile \\
  .devcontainer/devcontainer.json \\
  docs/x-forwarding.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(lvgl_display\): add LVGL SDL graphical display for gateway

New lib/lvgl_display library renders a 320x240 SDL window with:
- "WEATHER STATION" title \(Montserrat 14, cyan\)
- Large HH:MM clock \(Montserrat 48, white\), updated via k_work_delayable
- Up to 8 sensor reading rows auto-populated from sensor_event_chan

Thread-safety: widget creation in lvgl_lock/unlock at SYS_INIT priority 91
\(after LVGL workqueue at 90\). zbus listener updates sensor_slots[] under
k_spinlock, then schedules lv_async_call\(\) for LVGL-thread-safe label updates.

Gateway app changes:
- prj.conf: enable CONFIG_LVGL_DISPLAY + LVGL core options
- boards/native_sim.overlay: add chosen zephyr,display + &sdl_dc 320x240
- boards/native_sim_native_64.conf: CONFIG_LV_COLOR_DEPTH_32, MEM_POOL_SIZE

Devcontainer: add pkg-config, libsdl2-dev, xauth to Dockerfile; forward
DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY env vars and /tmp/.X11-unix bind mount for X forwarding.

Note: container rebuild required before first use \(pkg-config + libsdl2-dev
not yet installed in running container\). See docs/x-forwarding.md for setup.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add lib/lvgl_display/src/lvgl_display.c && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(lvgl_display\): add LVGL SDL graphical display for gateway

New lib/lvgl_display library renders a 320x240 SDL window with:
- "WEATHER STATION" title \(Montserrat 14, cyan\)
- Large HH:MM clock \(Montserrat 48, white\), updated via k_work_delayable
- Up to 8 sensor reading rows auto-populated from sensor_event_chan

Thread-safety: widget creation in lvgl_lock/unlock at SYS_INIT priority 91
\(after LVGL workqueue at 90\). zbus listener updates sensor_slots[] under
k_spinlock, then schedules lv_async_call\(\) for LVGL-thread-safe label updates.

Gateway app changes:
- prj.conf: enable CONFIG_LVGL_DISPLAY + LVGL core options
- boards/native_sim.overlay: add chosen zephyr,display + &sdl_dc 320x240
- boards/native_sim_native_64.conf: CONFIG_LV_COLOR_DEPTH_32, MEM_POOL_SIZE

Devcontainer: add pkg-config, libsdl2-dev, xauth to Dockerfile; forward
DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY env vars and /tmp/.X11-unix bind mount for X forwarding.

Note: container rebuild required before first use \(pkg-config + libsdl2-dev
not yet installed in running container\). See docs/x-forwarding.md for setup.
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add README.md && git commit -m "docs\(readme\): inline SDL/X-forwarding guide; remove docs/x-forwarding.md")
Bash(git add docs/backlog.md && git commit -m "docs\(backlog\): update DISPLAY entry — remove done items, list remaining steps")

Bash(git add .devcontainer/Dockerfile .devcontainer/setup-claude.sh && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore\(devcontainer\): set zephyr password and fix sudo/chown for credential persistence

Set zephyr user password to "zephyr" via chpasswd so sudo prompts are
answerable without a known password.

Added /usr/bin/chown to passwordless sudoers rule so setup-claude.sh can
fix bind-mount ownership \(Docker sometimes creates ~/.claude as root on
first container start, which breaks claude auth login persistence\).

Added sudo chown -R zephyr:zephyr ~/.claude in setup-claude.sh step 1
to recover from root-owned bind-mount directories automatically on every
container start.
EOF
\)")
Bash(SDL_VIDEODRIVER=offscreen LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 printf help\\nfake_sensors list\\nkernel uptime\\n:*)
Bash(DISPLAY= SDL_VIDEODRIVER=offscreen printf help\\nfake_sensors list\\nkernel uptime\\n:*)
Bash(SDL_VIDEODRIVER=offscreen SDL_RENDER_DRIVER=software printf help\\nfake_sensors list\\nkernel uptime\\n:*)
